question: Give me colorectal trials
final_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Trial name" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal'

retrieval_top.candidate_question: Which trials have Cancer type equal to Colorectal?
retrieval_top.candidate_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Trial name" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal';
SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Number of arms", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal';

retrieval_top.candidate_question: Trials where Cancer type is Colorectal
retrieval_top.candidate_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Cancer type", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal';
